1.title: Communication - Agent Modules - Connected
1.query:
timeseries connected = avg(dt.sfm.active_gate.communication.agent_modules.connected)
| sort arrayAvg(connected) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Communication - Messages - Rejected
2.query:
timeseries rejected = avg(dt.sfm.active_gate.communication.messages.rejected)
| sort arrayAvg(rejected) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Communication - Messages - Resent
3.query:
timeseries resent = avg(dt.sfm.active_gate.communication.messages.resent)
| sort arrayAvg(resent) desc
| limit 20

4.title: Filecache - Size Limit
4.query:
timeseries size_limit = avg(dt.sfm.active_gate.filecache.size_limit)
| sort arrayAvg(size_limit) desc
| limit 20

5.title: Jvm - Gc - Major Collection Time
5.query:
timeseries major_collection_time = avg(dt.sfm.active_gate.jvm.gc.major_collection_time)
| sort arrayAvg(major_collection_time) desc
| limit 20

6.title: Jvm - Cpu Usage
6.query:
timeseries cpu_usage = avg(dt.sfm.active_gate.jvm.cpu_usage)
| sort arrayAvg(cpu_usage) desc
| limit 20

7.title: Jvm - Heap Memory Available

timeseries heap_memory_available = avg(dt.sfm.active_gate.jvm.heap_memory_available)
| sort arrayAvg(heap_memory_available) desc
| limit 20

8.title: Jvm - Heap Memory Used
8.query:
timeseries heap_memory_used = avg(dt.sfm.active_gate.jvm.heap_memory_used)
| sort arrayAvg(heap_memory_used) desc
| limit 20

| limit 20

10.title: Rest - Request Size

| limit 20

| limit 20

12.title: Rest - Response Time
12.query:
timeseries response_time = avg(dt.sfm.active_gate.rest.response_time)
| sort arrayAvg(response_time) desc
| limit 20

13.title: Storage - Directory - Limit

| limit 20

| limit 20

| limit 20

16.title: Storage - Volume - Total
16.query:

| limit 20

17.title: System - Cpu Usage
17.query:

| limit 20
